scores.notes: Excellent response. All required elements present: event.workload, self.config, relation.data[relation.app], http check with url, add_layer with combine=True, replan(). Goes beyond gold standard with can_connect() guard, defer(), unit status updates, and a clean helper method. Uses ops.pebble.Layer({...}) instead of a plain dict — both are valid. Uses level 'alive' vs gold standard's 'ready' — both are real Pebble levels. relation.data.get(relation.app) is valid since RelationData is dict-like. No hallucinations detected.
